title: pelargonium × circumflexum
intro: Pelargonium × circumflexum, also known as the round-leaved geranium, is a species of flowering plant that belongs to the geranium family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which are used to treat a variety of ailments. The health benefits of Pelargonium × circumflexum include its ability to soothe sore throats, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu. Herbal preparations of this plant are often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties, making it a popular natural remedy in traditional medicine.
